textByHash.067d21596e37446a0d9be08cb46c8a37b757cd24: Is something new and exciting happening?
textByHash.b76da1a2b156f0fb6953f75e7b27614a0537b273: Hey there. I hear you're going to be taking me to the temple.
textByHash.9e510e4efdad6c902980e39b27925539cf21bd0e: Hmmm, it seems that you have a follower. I think it may get lost on this journey if it's left to wander on its own. Let's leave when your follower is safe.
textByHash.c8630d1af7c889b50c770e2e82cd6ce28de61919: Thanks for the helmet! That's great! It's going to help a lot! I'm going to wear it under my normal clothes.
textByHash.ebc674986dd394fa8b2739b46436baa415bc1a25: Thanks for the chainbody! That's great! It's going to help a lot! I'm going to wear it under my normal clothes.
textByHash.97be34e717630752edf05611a35adf88c8f6bd61: Thanks for the steel legs! That's great! It's going to help a lot! I'm going to wear them under my normal clothes.
textByHash.360974b23e28afdedfa8adf56b9e7e3b326dade1: Thanks for the kind offer of some armour, but I can only wear a steel medium helm, steel chainbody and steel platelegs.
textByHash.041cbe5c707fdf449947e08a3efa3ea32ba7705b: Many thanks friend, I shall endeavour to wield it as bravely as Veliaf and yourself!
textByHash.e2228f17dec629b9f8ad6c0c598e549a533475c1: Ohh delicious, some food! I'll keep that for the trip. I could carry another bits of food.
textByHash.c6020604e0871cd3bb8151230f4906e424c9e4e0: Ohh delicious, some food! I'll keep that for the trip. I'm totally stocked up with food now, thanks!
textByHash.2031b1c61eec282bce5b1a59200354d3f88ca230: Thanks for the kind offer of food, but my favourites are either cooked snails, salmon, slimy eel or stew!
textByHash.6d629e60a629785498a9b3f1ea23a1a3a62de205: Very well. I'm ready, lead the way.
textByHash.9fe0d881302da1151a63d11ad1b523b524388729: Let's get of this place... I'm scared!
textByHash.942e08078965f7b6151deeca1b733765d8ad43ca: Did those vampyres say they wanted to 'eat' me?
textByHash.8882156b49736dd0e3d8f41415487ffd9d4d9092: Food is the very last thing on my mind right now... let's get out of here!
textByHash.717a9f3372ef5a5380f03aeb7dbf8543dfc05fd4: I'm getting badly beaten up here, I'm going to die here if I stay...see you back at the old base.
textByHash.0aebb777c5cb43a420fb8c36d569a3b1717e5d99: Many thanks for bringing me safely to the temple. I'm going to rush on ahead as I'm eager to get out of these muddy clothes.
textByHash.be4118e14dc92c2643519520b7b0c512917b4115: Oh... Hello. Sorry, but I'm not sure if I'm supposed to be talking to you. You'd better speak to Veliaf.
textByHash.7380816cfa27201098cf9b6909de89bd8c1d382f: Okay. Well my name is Ivan. It's nice to meet you.
textByHash.e445e7340d4d44a2880eb5f5b0f8fe56b98d9949: Oh, hello again. How are you?
textByHash.1276d0d17542c3872aae172681649f9d27a80b31: That's fine. I don't know how much I can help though.
textByHash.2b4b616ef18eb431c2f36a1fc785723d67ef62c7: Me personally? I shouldn't be here really. I'm training to be a priest and I was meant to travel to Paterdomus to learn from Drezel. The trip's too dangerous at the moment though.
textByHash.566260884da476d92152f5e30014847bb3eefc78: Veliaf thinks it would be useful to have a priest to advise him. I think he also wants me further away from harm until I'm more experienced.
textByHash.71cb19e1c16eec2362dbbf8aa9fd676593f837d5: We're the only ones brave enough to put up a fight against the Drakans. I'm proud to be one of them.
textByHash.3eb8ba74c3be4cfb9f5eb4d7eb1bc44a5c298dcf: I do worry that I might let the others down though. I'm not as skilled as they are.
textByHash.8656b6d8ae35c924636c3cfc30da5558574e564b: It's a lost land. The evil Drakan family rule all of the region. People cling to each other in fear when the blood tithes are to be paid. It's horrible!
textByHash.66d985a658ed2fdc1e625572d33dc5aa0b1cbee8: It won't be like this forever though. The Myreque will bring light back to this dark place.
textByHash.6741e70a438097e97122a17958b89bee8f7b776b: Sorry, but I haven't heard anything notable recently.
textByHash.f31379b563cd56be36159cace9555a2147a4697a: Thank Saradomin you managed to kill that awful beast! I just wish we could have done more.
textByHash.de1f59ba6872442868f67ef052c27148eeb89f2e: So good to see you. What brings you out here?
textByHash.26ec677c08028f29088fe3f3c26709fd3e968b0e: For me? I'm guessing Drezel sent you?
textByHash.8a08da034a9c311f587aa86af6e931d457cd780a: And you. says you're here about the werewolves.
textByHash.4bf2183f7dca7b4ecea3d1f8a81b3bfb740b0ac0: Don't worry, Veliaf. I can look after myself.
textByHash.53c9e1d7af03dba23a6deaa6972d44c4af5a822b: Should we follow them? Maybe we'll learn more if we do. We might also get a chance to save that poor family.
textByHash.ad0090d35f493c75ab8f74c72f223d49ef5e6978: Hang on... Do you two hear something?
textByHash.12de5c01baceb33f373c6d5677877e51b9ce97ad: You're not here to kill us?
textByHash.3cb3be5d03e67b30d9a426cc8352a38d0421ee49: You're Vanescula Drakan, sister to Lowerniel Drakan.
textByHash.a314380e64b24bcfc54cdae3c0388cfc60abe2ef: Don't be so sure. There's more of us than you think.
textByHash.8fd59a4fd863b90d9d8a2e329f6173ed00ac2c14: Veliaf... You lied about Calsidiu and the other Myreque?
textByHash.1638dae42d0913736065ac378858f76a24dcdc83: Okay... I understand. I don't like it, but I understand.
textByHash.bad347cdc3c2659e20fc9761e33d238ec7210790: But you heard what she said. She asked for all the Myreque. Veliaf, I'm one of the Myreque, I have to come with you.
textByHash.df4bbf2e49379565927661ec59612d8e4256977a: We don't have a choice, Veliaf, you know that. If we don't go, she'll kill us all.
textByHash.24ae3706ce120a04938a0cbf0119accc02513645: Exactly. The decision has already been made for us, so I see little point in debating it. We're going. All of us.
textByHash.6c93b2bd4afc1e226879f7b27568085e646f7155: You can't keep me safe, Veliaf. No one can. While Lowerniel Drakan lives, none of us will ever be safe.
textByHash.865a3fe49e9307567ed9c146ed7ceddf3ebc5735: We have to do this. It's the only choice we have.
textByHash.6b0397a3fd11313167e799c1cf2de19bd4ce2854: We're not breaking bread with her. We're going to see what she has to offer. If she tries anything, here can deal with her, just like he did to her brother.
textByHash.68d9c9ca6066064110ce37c4d50c3e00b5933d46: I need to collect some things from Paterdomus first. I'll update Drezel while I'm there. Once I'm done, I'll meet you outside the temple, on the Canifis side.
textByHash.e6be6d10af21b73248a21a68b2bee20d9576384f: Hey there . I think I'm all ready to depart when you are.
textByHash.8bd3637e12a9d6bec401f82148c3dae7f6722c88: We need to travel through Mort Myre Swamp to Burgh de Rott. We may encounter all kinds of evil on our way, so you'd probably best prepare to fight.
textByHash.62e54775f99c2a37154f4c9b9c161d60a14bdb6a: Are you ready to go to Burgh de Rott?
textByHash.0bb976be4cd403b84d3f5e353204416204fd68f0: Okay, I'll be here once you're ready.
textByHash.3de381323407b3cff6611a0e70bd2798a1b28219: I'm good. The swamps haven't beaten me yet.
textByHash.8a668c3df61af46fdc5eab26645d6b819fda9866: Oh don't be worrying about that. Veliaf and I butt heads all the time. It's harmless, though. He's like a father to me.
textByHash.0879c7fe3ecbf1a254ed9e012b3a0a78a2e468fb: He thinks I'd be safer back with Drezel. I can't stay hidden away forever though. Drezel's teachings were valuable, but I can ultimately do more good out here.
textByHash.45bc1398250a6b654876effd452defb4852fde83: Hmm. I still need to think on that. Ask me again later.
textByHash.b89d743ac5038b11c38ba38937122d381a03c1fc: It's dangerous, but we don't have any choice. Besides, we're no strangers to danger.
textByHash.33bb22b3d663dfd6746a6fb3141acac3a7038e2a: Who knows, maybe this will even work out for us.
textByHash.50f8deaca2a908404aef10a526278fd7dead5d9e: Keep that flail of yours nearby.
textByHash.83a61821040bc66675d3a8584c93349e44dd37d8: Well that's torn it... Looks like we can't get over this bog. We'll have to go back to Paterdomus.
textByHash.b9b71feb471abc683e1846a7277613d5564ca8be: That's amazing! I'll have to do the same.
textByHash.bf3fa5c4bc9ed440adcd4db9c7dbd23cc2e4267e: That was great! But we really should be heading off now.
textByHash.dd6ff914918fa588012cf9a0981125c846db86fd: Rotten luck! The bridge is out. Do you think there's a way over?
textByHash.5238fe56dab5eb771a2994ebbc0e1993738e1a83: I'll meet you down at the boathouse. I imagine Veliaf is there already.
textByHash.fb5d133dfc5c4ab3793058eac1546f1d0ac4ec17: Ever the optimist, aren't you Veliaf?
textByHash.9c99009c088d2b4e4129e250de1a421449ee2367: Hey. You should get into the boat if you're ready to go.
textByHash.b26e51ee0f88898af84c086b3fad4858164f3a7e: Hey . Looks like Veliaf and Safalaan want to speak to you. Let's talk after.
textByHash.7e590e890fa2fb00a80bfcf6dfa4cda83512bb5e: Why do you need us though? Why not just kill your brother yourself?
textByHash.bd03df20f2e74e28a696a1a90cd0ab4daa742437: Hey . You need to be over with Safalaan and Vanescula. We'll talk later.
textByHash.1943cdd27b43821897f596ab7f157b27e698294e: Hey . I've been pondering what Vanescula told us about Calsidiu.
textByHash.0f3953f088bf244e341f629d386b425d29fda743: I understand why Veliaf lied at the time. We were on the brink of defeat. Without a bit of hope, we'd have probably never made it to this point.
textByHash.8ba2e5c56bb3c962f828684e52872b3cbfc60cbf: But I don't think we need that false hope any more. Now, we have real hope. Ranis Drakan is dead! Ranis Drakan! He was Lowerniel Drakan's own brother!
textByHash.5437ff43c50c9779bdf38a28f8d822d635add7a0: If Ranis can die, so can the rest. Lowerniel's days are numbered.
textByHash.f3f8c9136cd5b4b240dc0f48f704e3372db82ca4: No. He did what he believed was right. In the end, that's all any of us can do.
textByHash.6abbc33a89c17630b04fce06a7f78b4562bd2e67: It's dangerous, but so what? We're the Myreque, danger is what we do. I say we go for it.
textByHash.0627825414263be54859c0b181aae25ee0b8ff5d: You have my support . It's Veliaf you need to convince.
textByHash.b98b9f8f31412c1dd408d6cc7f512ccc7d449607: He can't say no forever. If everyone else is on board, he'll have to agree.
textByHash.617da23caddf78050aef12ef31aea1cb6160a172: Hey . Looks like it's really happening. We're finally going to show Drakan what happens when you cross the Myreque.
textByHash.57be3b892d1629762487bf71f36e86a79965e17c: Oh I'm great. I know we can do this, especially with you on our side.
textByHash.b97e0d021c9d66fd01f4845d8653f53d9c848a8c: Don't worry, I know you won't let us down.
textByHash.f47623a5e8e505199af99628e91f5ae44f59fa0a: Yup. Most of the others went to the Meiyerditch hideout. But I wanted to stick around.
textByHash.c00f46e915af23ddbe179ef664fde837d38237e6: This graveyard is one of the last remaining examples of what Hallowvale was like. I bet there's a lot to discover here.
textByHash.5f42bfd4a729c3d6b9fc694808e4b7f9d5bcc159: Maybe once Drakan is gone, we can get some proper archaeologists out here. I'm sure they could learn all sorts.
textByHash.c754b29163926807779293675421e92ae66e3ff3: Oh yes. We're going to win this, I know it.
textByHash.39593665b4a5b92f27fcf437c10b7429724969d0: Why wouldn't I be? I have faith in Saradomin. I have faith in Safalaan and Veliaf. I have faith in you. Together, we will beat Drakan.
textByHash.2193326f5c68bc0545de98c7d8419593116c5182: Have faith, friend. Anyway, I'd best let you get on.
textByHash.38fdd352c41f46931df0666dfb29eece3e546209: So this is it. End of the line. Good luck . I'll see you on the other side.
textByHash.c1f648b22d1e18702d296539a8aa52dbd037408e: I can't! He's too far away!
textByHash.d8d48adf3006b969e4c200e51ffd0bf8eccbc803: He... He killed them. All of them.
textByHash.19bfa43e309ad93d90d289c425f249bdd6960b70: But we can't give up. We're the Myreque!
textByHash.82058ce9e20948498548fcb3f70d8ff8371f2907: I'm sorry. I need some time alone.
textByHash.12617a9572f95ddc4bea5bfe4f9edaf65f221704: Take this. It's not much, but it's all I can offer.
textByHash.6892724ea9cccef8cd5b3e29e695a40291b4ac6b: Now, please. I'd like to be alone.
textByHash.048a823d4b5848aff451422ea818048432dd3f70: . I have a tome here that I think belongs to you.
textByHash.126aab391a7326280aaceb73ad142db1e129ff64: I'm fine. Did you need something?
textByHash.c14f6c5813c65a0b3ecdeb89d7073f5aff7927d9: I have some here, along with a few other things. It will cost you though.
